text:

Log:
  Update to 2.17.5.

  * Allow https URLs for the WWW line in pkg-descr.  Why are we only NOW doing
    this? [1]
  * Check TIMESTAMP to make sure it's in the present/past, but not more than 30
    days in the past. [2]
